title: Invizimals Cobblemon Addon
description:
🎶There is some crazy creatures that have allways been around us!🎶
  🎶Hanging out inside your home! But you'll have never seen them!🎶
  🎶Now with this new addon we will finally gonna see what's going down!🎶
body:
**This Datapack + Resourcepack adds creatures from novaramas's franchise known as Invizimals to Cobblemon**

Here you will be able to battle and tame these wonderfull creatures in minecraft cobblemon!

![XueHu pup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9ab4fcd21bd54f40c2b577b703af57beeb219d7.gif)

**for now it only adds 3 invizimals species**


```
TigerShark (Fighting Type🤛)
```

```
XueHu (Flying Fire Type🪁🔥)
```


```
IceLion (Ice Type🧊)
```

**"Okay...But...How can i make this file work on Minecraft?"**
Simple!
First you download the latest version of your datapacks folder

to do this you will have to be on the Create New World menu in minecraft! And then you go to:

```
More -> Datapacks -> (Now you put the invizimals file you just downloaded in your game) -> Put it in selected
```
load this world and check the command: "/pokespawn xuehu_pup" to see if it works!

**Cool it spawns! but now you only see it as an substitute doll dont you?**

now press esc and go:


```
Options -> ResourcePacks (Now you put an EXACT COPY of that invizimals file you just downloaded in your game) -> Put it in selected
```
now with the resource pack fully loaded u should see this cutie like this! (brown one is shiny = "/pokespawn xuehu_pup shiny=yes")

![XueHu pup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7b53b363094d824eb93fbd7dca718464e4bea22.png)


**I hope you have fun! Cuz i sure had!**
